nodes.label: Role-specific prompts and pure output validation adapters.
nodes.norm_label: role-specific prompts and pure output validation adapters.

nodes.label: Conservative classification. Ambiguous logs never enable patching.
nodes.norm_label: conservative classification. ambiguous logs never enable patching.

nodes.label: Process configuration. Secrets are intentionally never serialized or logged.
nodes.norm_label: process configuration. secrets are intentionally never serialized or logged.

nodes.label: A stored signed fixture replayed through the same verification path.
nodes.norm_label: a stored signed fixture replayed through the same verification path.

nodes.label: Versioned fixture validation and deterministic evaluation.
nodes.norm_label: versioned fixture validation and deterministic evaluation.

nodes.label: Deliberately excludes labels, expected evidence, and scoring assertions.
nodes.norm_label: deliberately excludes labels, expected evidence, and scoring assertions.

nodes.label: Trusted adapters. Agent code must not import credentials from this package.
nodes.norm_label: trusted adapters. agent code must not import credentials from this package.

nodes.label: Role-gated facade. It deliberately has no generic REST method or write method.
nodes.norm_label: role-gated facade. it deliberately has no generic rest method or write method.

nodes.label: Narrow port implemented only by the trusted GitHub App adapter.
nodes.norm_label: narrow port implemented only by the trusted github app adapter.

nodes.label: Narrow GitHub App writer using an atomic non-force Git ref update.
nodes.norm_label: narrow github app writer using an atomic non-force git ref update.

nodes.label: Sole write path. It rechecks the head SHA after policy evaluation.
nodes.norm_label: sole write path. it rechecks the head sha after policy evaluation.

nodes.label: Small adapter seam for the GitHub App archive client.
nodes.norm_label: small adapter seam for the github app archive client.

nodes.label: Trusted GitHub App adapter that returns only a credential-free pinned snapshot.
nodes.norm_label: trusted github app adapter that returns only a credential-free pinned snapshot.

nodes.label: Test adapter. Production configuration must use a provider-backed gateway.
nodes.norm_label: test adapter. production configuration must use a provider-backed gateway.

nodes.label: Preserve OpenRouter billing metadata dropped by the OpenAI schema.
nodes.norm_label: preserve openrouter billing metadata dropped by the openai schema.

nodes.label: Provider adapter. The API key exists only in this trusted process.
nodes.norm_label: provider adapter. the api key exists only in this trusted process.

nodes.label: Production Pydantic AI adapter for typed output and bounded snapshot tools.
nodes.norm_label: production pydantic ai adapter for typed output and bounded snapshot tools.

nodes.label: Match Langfuse's deterministic W3C trace-ID derivation.
nodes.norm_label: match langfuse's deterministic w3c trace-id derivation.

nodes.label: Pure deterministic policy checks callable without network or Docker.
nodes.norm_label: pure deterministic policy checks callable without network or docker.

nodes.label: Execute the only durable CI write flow after all evidence exists.
nodes.norm_label: execute the only durable ci write flow after all evidence exists.

nodes.label: Renew one durable lease while its worker attempt is active.
nodes.norm_label: renew one durable lease while its worker attempt is active.

nodes.label: Minimal durable worker loop for Milestone 1.  It leases work only. Agent executi
nodes.norm_label: minimal durable worker loop for milestone 1.  it leases work only. agent executi

nodes.label: Process one claimed run and roll back if lease ownership is lost.
nodes.norm_label: process one claimed run and roll back if lease ownership is lost.

nodes.label: Typed, read-only repository tools for model-facing workflows.
nodes.norm_label: typed, read-only repository tools for model-facing workflows.

nodes.label: An immutable, credential-free source snapshot supplied by the gateway.
nodes.norm_label: an immutable, credential-free source snapshot supplied by the gateway.

nodes.label: Search parsed structure without exposing ast-grep or shell command text.
nodes.norm_label: search parsed structure without exposing ast-grep or shell command text.
